rationale: The pair has only a single DOI-level bibliography match and no in-text citation context or reference text, so direct evidence of use is limited. However, the citing paper models customer response to marketing communications with Bayesian individual-level structure, and the cited paper is a methodological sales-response model for nonrandom marketing-mix allocation, making a substantive method/foundational link plausible. Given this sparse but plausible overlap, it is not safe to drop as obvious mention-only.
